name: obsidian-nexus
description: Universal Obsidian intelligence system for agentic workflows.

settings.name: vault_path
settings.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault root (e.g., G:\Obsidian\MyVault)

settings.name: project_name
settings.description: The name of your project (used for filenames in the vault)

tools.name: obsidian_search
tools.description: Search the vault for a query.

tools.name: obsidian_property_set
tools.description: Set a property on a note.
